span.p:
You message the bot
on Telegram

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
First thing you see:
this is NOT a doctor.
Emergencies go to real care, now.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
A few structured questions:
what, since when, how bad,
red-flag screening

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Local privacy filter strips
emails, phone numbers, ID numbers
before anything leaves your server

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
2 or more independent AI models
answer the same case separately

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Plain-language considerations
and practical next steps

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
You are TOLD they disagreed.
Disagreement is shown,
never hidden.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Short FAQ: what this is,
what it is not, whom to trust

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
You arrive at your next doctor visit
prepared: organized symptoms,
history, and questions
